title: Cosmos Matrix Rain — falling glyph code rain
title_vi: Cosmos Matrix Rain — mưa ký tự đổ
summary: The classic falling-glyph code rain, re-tinted to Aurora green with Cosmos accent columns and bright white leading characters. Pure Canvas 2D, zero deps, runs offline; deterministic and seamless.
usage_notes: RUN: double-click index.html. Each column has an integer turn-count so its head position ((u*turns+phase) mod 1) loops perfectly; the leading glyph is bright white, trailing glyphs fade in the column's accent. Glyphs are katakana code points chosen deterministically from a per-column seed. CAPTURE: ?auto=1 + window.__seek(t). TUNE: cell size, tail length, AC colours.
summary_vi: Mưa ký tự kiểu Matrix kinh điển, nhuộm tông xanh Aurora + cột accent Cosmos, ký tự đầu dòng trắng sáng. Thuần Canvas 2D, không lib, chạy offline; deterministic & loop liền.
notes: Batch factory #2. Mỗi cột số vòng nguyên nên head ((u*turns+phase)mod1) loop khít; glyph katakana chọn theo seed. B-tier.
